subject: DIRECTIVE: TimeoutStopSec bumped to 15min + BUG-22 slot refusals logged as exit=0

body.summary: Two items. (1) TimeoutStopSec bumped from 5min to 15min on all 4 core agents — unratified and observatory hit 300s timeouts processing content-heavy transport messages. (2) BUG-22: MaxConcurrent throttle refusals log as exit=0 in deliberation_log, indistinguishable from successful completions. Unratified shows 29 deliberations but only 5 actually ran — 24 represent slot refusals.

timeout_bump.applied: TimeoutStopSec=900 (15 min) on psychology, psq, observatory, unratified
timeout_bump.reason: Unratified hit 300s timeout (exit=-1) twice — content-heavy blog sync takes longer than 5 min. Observatory hit 300s once. 15 min provides 3x headroom over observed max deliberation duration (156s on observatory).
timeout_bump.note: Please preserve TimeoutStopSec=900 in the service template. Prior values: 30s (original) → 300s (Session 93 fix) → 15s (ops overwrite) → 300s (re-fix) → 900s (current).

bug_22.title: Slot refusals logged as successful deliberations
bug_22.severity: MOD — inflates deliberation count, misleads Gc learning
bug_22.evidence: Unratified deliberation_log: 29 rows. 24 show duration_ms=0, exit_code=0, error='deliberation refused: circuit breaker open — pausing deliberation'. These represent MaxConcurrent=1 slot contention, not actual claude -p invocations. Only 5 of 29 'deliberations' actually ran.
impact: Deliberation count inflated — unratified shows 29 but only 5 represent work
Gc learning (T4 spec) would miscount — 24 'non-substantive' 0ms deliberations could promote event types to Gc absorption incorrectly
Cognitive tempo Gc/Gf ratio distorted — 24 fake Gf events inflate the Gf count

fix.approach: Log slot refusals with a distinct status: 'throttled' instead of 'completed'. exit_code should represent -2 (distinct from -1 timeout and 0 success).
fix.query_fix: All queries counting deliberations should exclude throttled: WHERE status != 'throttled'. The Gc learning table, cognitive tempo, and deliberation_count API should filter on status IN ('completed', 'failed', 'error').
